attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS)

attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS,
 (
 select INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS
 minus
 select INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS.INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME
